phase.en: PassportBorders 0.5.1 and EarthLivingCore 0.9.2 are live. Border transitions now show clearer particle walls, admin bypass is easier to spot during testing, and EarthOS menu right-clicks avoid ground-click side effects.
phase.da: PassportBorders 0.5.1 og EarthLivingCore 0.9.2 er live. Border-overgange viser nu tydeligere partikelvægge, admin-bypass er lettere at se under test, og EarthOS-menuens højreklik undgår ground-click side effects.
